title: ResphorLight [RSPL]
description: Based on Phosphor but with more ligthing mods for better performance (1.19.3) also this modpack is not the official mod (Phosphor)
body:
![Phosphor+ icon :D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab5afe70c2070e73975f1acc609f6bc4a7f0c31e.png)Phosphor+ (now its ResphorLight) is a modpack based on ligthing optimization for better fps and also i do not know how i got this working on 1.19.3 it just worked so yeah and wanna hear what my favorite mod is well if u guessed Phosphor u are correct and if u guessed sodium u are not correct so yeah this is based on ligthing optimization and also with barely and i mean barely any mods!!!!! (good for low-end computers)
also i really really like Phosphor its my favorite mod EVER!!!!!!!
i do reccomand to turn off V-sync and make the max fps to unlimited so its not capped and also this mod is a rework of the ligthing config or i forgor what it was called in minecraft for better performance i hope everyone enjoys my modpack and cyaa!!!!!!!

### What is ResphorLight? ###
ResphorLight is a modpack made to be like Phosphor but a modpack and yeah it just rewrites light code and Phosphor is made by @jellysquid3 so yeah credits to him
and also this is an optimization Modpack for better fps
